headline: Revvity to Hold Earnings Call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., April 10, 2026--Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY), today announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results prior to market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The Company will host a conference call the same day at 7:30 a.m. ET to discuss these results. Prahlad Singh, president and chief executive officer, and Max Krakowiak, chief financial officer, will host the conference call.
